title: ADNOC Brings BP, TotalEnergies Into Abu Dhabi’s Biggest Gas Cap Project
summary: The national oil company of the United Arab Emirates, ADNOC, has signed agreements with BP and TotalEnergies to let the European oil and gas supermajors take 10% each in the consortium developing one of Abu Dhabi’s largest gas fields. title: Gold hovers around $4,000, silver holds below $60 — has the shimmer worn off the precious metal rally?
summary: Gold is down almost 8% so far this year, while silver has shed more than 20%.

title: Global Battery Storage Boom Is A Boon for Tesla
summary: Global battery storage installations are booming, and so is Tesla’s utility-scale battery business. title: Why Wet Coffee Grounds Might Be The Next Waste-To-Energy Goldmine
summary: A team of researchers at the Korea Institute of Geoscience and Mineral Resources (KIGAM) have just found a way to make biochar production faster and cheaper. title: Canada Building West’s First Grid-Scale SMR
summary: Construction has begun on the Western world’s first grid-scale Small Modular Reactor (SMR), though small is not what comes to mind, considering that the machine will fit on two soccer fields.
